value.title: Announcing Genkit Dart: Build full-stack AI apps with Dart and Flutter

content.subtitle: Announcing the preview launch of Genkit Dart, an open-source AI framework for building full-stack, AI-powered apps for any platform.

paragraphs.name: 9ce3
paragraphs.text: Announcing Genkit Dart: Build full-stack AI apps with Dart and Flutter

paragraphs.name: b943
paragraphs.text: Announcing the preview launch of Genkit Dart, an open-source AI framework for building full-stack, AI-powered apps for any platform.

paragraphs.name: 737d
paragraphs.text: The Dart and Flutter communities have always pushed the boundaries of what’s possible across screens. You’ve shown that building high-quality, multi-platform applications doesn’t require compromising on developer experience. Now we’re bringing the same “write once, run anywhere” philosophy to AI-powered features and applications.

paragraphs.name: 19b2
paragraphs.text: We are thrilled to announce the preview launch of Genkit Dart, an open-source AI framework for Dart and Flutter developers. Already available for TypeScript, Go, and Python, Genkit now empowers you to build high-quality, full-stack, AI-powered applications for any platform.

paragraphs.name: 1e9e
paragraphs.text: Announcing Genkit Dart (Preview)

paragraphs.name: 086f
paragraphs.text: Why choose Genkit Dart?

paragraphs.name: 7d7e
paragraphs.text: Genkit Dart provides you with the following capabilities:

paragraphs.name: 95ed
paragraphs.text: Model-agnostic API: Supports Google, Anthropic, OpenAI, and OpenAI API-compatible models out-of-the-box. You’re never locked into a single provider.
Type safety: Uses Dart’s strong type system with the schemantic package to generate strongly typed data and create type-safe AI flows.

paragraphs.name: 3eca
paragraphs.text: Run code anywhere: Write your AI logic once and run it as a backend service or directly inside your Flutter app.

paragraphs.name: 78ab
paragraphs.text: Developer UI: Includes a localhost web UI where you can test prompts, view traces, and debug your flows.

paragraphs.name: 9e2f
paragraphs.text: Complete AI toolkit: Provides everything you need to build high-quality AI features, including structured output, tools, multi-step flows, observability, and more.
Model-agnostic API

paragraphs.name: fe06
paragraphs.text: Genkit is designed to support any LLM provider, with out-of-the-box support for Google, Anthropic, OpenAI, and OpenAI API-compatible models in this release. This lets you switch between providers with minimal code changes.

paragraphs.name: f8f3
e948
paragraphs.text: Type-safe AI flows

paragraphs.name: 79ed
paragraphs.text: Genkit lets you wrap your AI logic into testable, observable, deployable functions called flows.

paragraphs.name: 6e6e
paragraphs.text: Here is an example of a Travel Planner flow using strongly-typed input and output schemas, with tool calling:

paragraphs.name: ee30
c63a
paragraphs.text: When you’re ready, you can easily expose your flow as an API using the genkit_shelfpackage and deploy it to any platform that supports Dart.

paragraphs.name: 115d
2a1b
paragraphs.text: Run anywhere Dart runs

paragraphs.name: 719d
paragraphs.text: Most complex AI logic runs on a server. However, because Dart works on both the frontend and backend, Genkit lets you easily move your AI code between your server and your Flutter app.

paragraphs.name: bb69
paragraphs.text: Here are a few ways you can build with Genkit Dart:
1. Entirely in Flutter for prototyping

paragraphs.name: d320
paragraphs.text: You can write all of your Genkit logic, including model calls, directly in your Flutter app. This is great for prototypes or apps where users provide their own API keys and prompts aren’t private.

paragraphs.name: eb73
paragraphs.text: Warning: You should never publish an app with your API key embedded in the source code as it can be extracted and used by others.
2. Call backend flows from Flutter

paragraphs.name: 6c39
paragraphs.text: When your prompts are sensitive or your AI logic is complex, you can move the entire flow to your backend. Your Flutter app can then call this flow by defining it as a “remote action”. Since the backend and frontend are both in Dart, they can share the same schemas for end-to-end type safety.

paragraphs.name: aa0a
paragraphs.text: Here is an example showing how to call the Trip Planner backend flow we defined earlier from your Flutter app:

paragraphs.name: b6d9
663c
paragraphs.text: 3. In Flutter with remote models

paragraphs.name: 0c50
paragraphs.text: To secure your API keys while keeping the core AI logic in your Flutter app, you can create a small Genkit backend that proxies requests to the model provider with custom authorization logic. The models exposed through this backend are remote models.

paragraphs.name: 164e
4b01
paragraphs.text: In your Flutter app, use the remote model instead of a direct model plugin, passing any headers your server needs. This saves you from exposing your API keys and gives you more control over request authorization.

paragraphs.name: bf23
85d9
paragraphs.text: Powerful tools for AI development

paragraphs.name: af24
paragraphs.text: Building high-quality AI applications requires thorough testing and continuous iteration to achieve reliable results. To help with this, Genkit provides a powerful local Developer UI.

paragraphs.name: d1ac
paragraphs.text: You can start the Developer UI alongside your code by running your app with the Genkit CLI:

paragraphs.name: f203
paragraphs.text: genkit start -- dart run bin/server.dart

paragraphs.name: 4ec4
paragraphs.text: Here is a look at testing a more advanced version of our Trip Planner flow in the Developer UI:

paragraphs.name: 570e
paragraphs.text: Showing the Genkit Developer UI running a flow

paragraphs.name: f61a
paragraphs.text: AI coding assistance

paragraphs.name: 29a1
paragraphs.text: For the best experience using Genkit Dart with AI coding tools like Antigravity, Gemini CLI, or Claude Code, install the Genkit Dart agent skill. This gives your AI assistant the knowledge to accurately write and debug your AI features.

paragraphs.name: 70fa
paragraphs.text: Add the skill to your project:

paragraphs.name: bd23
paragraphs.text: npx skills add genkit-ai/skills

paragraphs.name: e08a
paragraphs.text: Learn more

paragraphs.name: 3eea
paragraphs.text: This release is an early preview. We want to work with Dart and Flutter developers to improve the framework. You can find the core packages and provider plugins on pub.dev today.

paragraphs.name: 0b44
paragraphs.text: Get started: Read our quickstart guide.

paragraphs.name: 94b4
paragraphs.text: Join the community: Join our Discord server to ask questions and chat with the team.

paragraphs.name: 6d88
paragraphs.text: Stay updated: Follow us on X and LinkedIn.

paragraphs.name: 3f61
paragraphs.text: Give feedback: Open an issue on our GitHub repository to report bugs or request features.

paragraphs.name: d0f7
paragraphs.text: We can’t wait to see what you build with Genkit Dart!
